title: Senior Doctor - Tata Memorial Centre - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Tata Memorial Centre - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Tata Memorial Centre, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata Memorial Centre:
Tata Memorial Centre is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Memorial Centre!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
